account_year.text: ปีเฉลี่ยคืน

root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
, sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.average_return , sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.drop_average , sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.entry_date , sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.entry_id
, sc_mem_m_capital_pay.post_date
,sc_acc_m_account_year.beginning_of_account ,sc_acc_m_account_year.ending_of_account
,sc_mem_m_capital_rate.lonint_rate
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_capital_pay , sc_mem_m_capital_rate , sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail , sc_acc_m_account_year where sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_capital_pay.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_capital_rate.lon_year = sc_mem_m_capital_pay.account_year and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.membership_no and sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.account_year = sc_mem_m_capital_pay.account_year and sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year = sc_mem_m_capital_rate.lon_year and sc_mem_m_capital_pay.seq_no = '1' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.account_year ,sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.membership_no
